title: Issues

empty.select_company: Select a company to view issues.
empty.my_select_company: Select a company to view your issues.

search_limit: Showing up to {{count}} matches. Refine the search to narrow further.
no_match: No issues match the current filters or search.

properties.remove_blocker_desc: Remove {{label}} as a blocker for this issue.

detail.run_ledger_waiting: Waiting for the first run record.

toast.cancel_queued_failed_body: Unable to cancel the queued comment
toast.interrupt_requested_body: The active run is stopping so queued comments can continue next.
toast.interrupt_failed_body: Unable to interrupt the active run
toast.queued_comment_canceled_body: The queued message was restored to the composer.
toast.pause_work_body_held: Work paused. This issue is held until resume.
toast.monitor_failed_body: Unable to trigger the monitor right now
toast.accept_failed_body: Unable to accept the suggested tasks
toast.reject_failed_body: Unable to reject the suggested tasks
toast.feedback_saved_will_share: Feedback saved. Future votes will share
toast.feedback_saved_stay_local: Feedback saved. Future votes will stay local
toast.archive_failed_body: Unable to archive this issue from the inbox

detail.wake_agents: Wake assigned agents after this operation completes.
detail.subtree_control_placeholder: Explain why this subtree control is being applied...
detail.deferred_resume_note: Resume from the root issue to deliver deferred work.
detail.tree_control_pause_subtree_help: Pause active execution in this issue subtree until an explicit resume.
detail.tree_control_resume_subtree_help: Release the active subtree pause hold so held work can continue.
detail.tree_control_cancel_subtree_help: Cancel non-terminal issues in this subtree and stop queued/running work where possible.
detail.tree_control_restore_subtree_help: Restore issues cancelled by this subtree operation so work can resume.
detail.tree_control_pause_work_help: Pause active execution on this issue until an explicit resume.
detail.tree_control_resume_work_help: Release the active pause hold so this issue can continue.
detail.tree_control_err_forbidden: Only board users can preview subtree controls.
detail.tree_control_err_stale: Preview is stale because subtree hold state changed. Retry to refresh.
detail.tree_control_err_invalid: This subtree action is currently invalid for the selected issues.
detail.wake_assignee_for_triage: Sending this comment will wake {{name}} for triage while the subtree remains paused.
detail.assign_agent_for_triage: Assign an agent to wake them for triage while the subtree remains paused.
detail.productivity_review_tooltip: This task is a productivity review.

board_column_limit: Some board columns are showing up to {{count}} issues. Refine filters or search to reveal the rest.

row.needs_next_step_desc: This issue needs a next step

chat.feedback_dialog_desc: Choose whether voted AI outputs can be shared with Paperclip Labs. This answer becomes the default for future thumbs up and thumbs down votes.
chat.feedback_local_only: This vote is always saved locally.
chat.feedback_sharing_choice: Choose Always allow to share this vote and future voted AI outputs. Choose Don't allow to keep this vote and future votes local.
chat.feedback_settings_hint: You can change this later in Instance Settings > General.
chat.empty_conversation: This issue conversation is empty. Start with a message below.
chat.error_banner: Chat renderer hit an internal state error.
chat.error_banner_desc: Showing a safe fallback transcript instead of crashing the issues page.
chat.no_assignee_body: Pick an assignee or click Send again to post without one.
chat.paused_budget_stop: It was paused by a budget hard stop.
chat.paused_system: It was paused by the system.
chat.paused_agent: {{name}} is paused. New runs will not start until the agent is resumed. {{detail}}
chat.drop_upload_hint: Images insert into the reply. Other files are added to this issue.
chat.planning_mode_active_title: Planning mode is on for this submission. Click to switch to Standard.
chat.attachment_unsupported_file_type: This file type cannot be attached here

descriptions.status: Issue state chip on the left edge.
descriptions.project: Linked project pill with its color.
descriptions.workspace: Execution or project workspace used for the issue.

dialog.execution_workspace_desc: Control whether this issue runs in the shared workspace, a new isolated workspace, or an existing one.
dialog.lane_primary_desc: Runs on the agent's primary model.
dialog.lane_custom_desc: Override the model and effort for this issue only.
dialog.lane_cheap_uses_profile: · uses the agent's configured cheap profile
dialog.lane_cheap_fallback: · falls back to the primary model if no cheap profile is configured
dialog.parent_workspace_warning: Warning: this sub-issue will no longer use the parent issue workspace{{suffix}}.
dialog.create_failed: Failed to create issue. Try again.
dialog.upload_warnings_body_one: {{count}} staged file could not be added.
dialog.upload_warnings_body_other: {{count}} staged files could not be added.
dialog.assignee_backlog_note: Assigning implies executable intent — leave status as Backlog only to deliberately park this. The assignee will not be woken until status moves to Todo or In Progress.

workspace_close_dialog.description: Archive {{name}} and clean up any owned workspace artifacts. Paperclip keeps the workspace record and issue history, but removes it from active workspace views.
workspace_close_dialog.checking: Checking whether this workspace is safe to close...
workspace_close_dialog.failed_inspect: Failed to inspect workspace close readiness.
workspace_close_dialog.shared_workspace_note: This is a shared workspace session. Archiving it removes this session record but keeps the underlying project workspace.
workspace_close_dialog.own_checkout_note: This execution workspace has its own checkout path and can be archived independently.
workspace_close_dialog.primary_workspace_note: This execution workspace currently points at the project's primary workspace path.
workspace_close_dialog.disposable_note: This workspace is disposable and can be archived.
workspace_close_dialog.cleanup_failed_note: Cleanup previously failed on this workspace. Retrying close will rerun the cleanup flow and update the workspace status if it succeeds.

documents.heading: Documents
documents.key_error: Use lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _, and start with a letter or number.
documents.key_body_required: Document key and body are required
documents.key_pattern_error: Document key must start with a letter or number and use only lowercase letters, numbers, -, or _.
documents.conflict_load_error: Document changed remotely and the latest version could not be loaded
documents.revision_preview_error: Save or cancel your local changes before viewing an older revision.
documents.historical_preview_desc: This is a historical preview. Restoring it creates a new latest revision and keeps history append-only.
documents.out_of_date_desc: This document changed while you were editing. Your local draft is preserved and autosave is paused.
documents.confirm_delete: Delete this document? This cannot be undone.

workspace_card.isolated_pending: A fresh isolated workspace will be created when this issue runs.
workspace_card.reuse_pending: This issue will reuse an existing workspace when it runs.
workspace_card.default_pending: This issue will use the project default workspace configuration when it runs.

related_work.references_description: Other tasks this issue currently points at in its title, description, comments, or documents.
related_work.references_empty: This issue does not reference any other tasks yet.
related_work.referenced_by_description: Other tasks that currently point at this issue.
related_work.referenced_by_empty: No other tasks reference this issue yet.

ledger.liveness_advanced_desc: Run produced concrete evidence of progress.
ledger.liveness_plan_only_desc: Run described future work without concrete action evidence.
ledger.liveness_blocked_desc: Run or issue declared a blocker.
ledger.liveness_needs_followup_desc: Run produced useful output but did not prove concrete progress.
ledger.liveness_pending_desc: Liveness is evaluated after the run finishes.
ledger.liveness_retry_desc: Paperclip queued an automatic retry that has not started yet.
ledger.liveness_missing_desc: This run has no persisted liveness classification.
ledger.watchdog_silence_body: Latest active run has been silent for {{duration}}.
ledger.empty_with_activity: Runs and activity will appear here once this issue has history.
ledger.empty_without_activity: Historical runs without liveness metadata will appear here once linked to this issue.
ledger.watchdog_cannot_record: Paperclip could not record the watchdog decision.
ledger.watchdog_forbidden: Only the board or the assigned recovery owner can record watchdog decisions
ledger.profile_cheap_fallback: Cheap profile fell back to primary

blocked_notice.needs_next_step: This issue still needs a next step.
blocked_notice.run_finished_in: A run finished successfully, but this issue is still open in
blocked_notice.no_clear_owner: with no clear owner for the next action.
blocked_notice.action_send_review: Send it for review or ask for input.
blocked_notice.action_mark_blocked: Mark it blocked with a blocker owner.
blocked_notice.action_delegate: Delegate follow-up work or queue a continuation.
blocked_notice.blocked_stalled_multi: Work on this issue is blocked by {{blockerLabel}}, but the chain is stalled in review without a clear next step. Resolve the stalled reviews below or remove them as blockers.
blocked_notice.blocked_stalled_one: Work on this issue is blocked by {{blockerLabel}}, but the chain is stalled in review without a clear next step. Resolve the stalled review below or remove it as a blocker.
blocked_notice.blocked_until_it_is: Work on this issue is blocked by {{blockerLabel}} until it is complete. Comments still wake the assignee for questions or triage.
blocked_notice.blocked_until_they_are: Work on this issue is blocked by {{blockerLabel}} until they are complete. Comments still wake the assignee for questions or triage.
blocked_notice.blocked_no_status: Work on this issue is blocked until it is moved back to todo. Comments still wake the assignee for questions or triage.

interaction.created_and_skipped_one: Created {{count}} draft issue and skipped {{skipped}} during review.
interaction.created_and_skipped_other: Created {{count}} draft issues and skipped {{skipped}} during review.
interaction.will_skip: {{count}} will be skipped if you accept this interaction.
interaction.rejection_placeholder: Add a short reason for rejecting this suggestion
interaction.submit_instruction: Submit once after you finish the full form.
interaction.superseded_by_comment: A board comment superseded this confirmation before it was resolved.
interaction.target_changed: The requested target changed before this confirmation was resolved.
interaction.could_not_resolve: This request could not be resolved. Try again or create a new request.

will_not_be_woken_until_status_changes_t: will not be woken until status changes to
comments_still_wake_the_assignee_for_que: Comments still wake the assignee for questions or triage. Leave this parked only if the work is intentionally on hold.
this_issue_still_needs_a_next_step: This issue still needs a next step.
a_run_finished_successfully_but_this_iss: A run finished successfully, but this issue is still open in
with_no_clear_owner_for_the_next_action: with no clear owner for the next action.
send_it_for_review_or_ask_for_input: Send it for review or ask for input.
mark_it_blocked_with_a_blocker_owner: Mark it blocked with a blocker owner.
delegate_follow_up_work_or_queue_a_conti: Delegate follow-up work or queue a continuation.
work_on_this_issue_is_blocked_by_label: Work on this issue is blocked by {label}...
work_on_this_issue_is_blocked_until_it_i: Work on this issue is blocked until it is moved back to todo.
remove_confirmlabel_as_a_blocker_for_thi: Remove {confirmLabel} as a blocker for this issue.
blocked_by_parked_work__at_least_one_ass: Blocked by parked work — at least one assigned blocker is in backlog...
last_attempt_failed_error_paperclip_will: Last attempt failed: {error}. Paperclip will retry automatically.
choose_which_issue_columns_stay_visible: Choose which issue columns stay visible
no_issues_match_the_current_filters_or_s: No issues match the current filters or search.
parked__assignee_will_not_be_woken: Parked — assignee will not be woken
issue_execution_is_held_until_resume_hum: Issue execution is held until resume. Human comments can still wake the assignee for triage.
root_and_descendant_execution_is_held_un: Root and descendant execution is held until resume. Human comments can still wake assignees for triage.
this_issue_is_paused_by_ancestor: This issue is paused by ancestor
a_new_join_request_is_waiting_for_approv: A new join request is waiting for approval.
this_issue_is_paused_by_ancestor_resume_: This issue is paused by ancestor … Resume from the root issue to deliver deferred work.
lane_cheap_uses_profile: · uses the agent's configured cheap profile
lane_cheap_fallback: · falls back to the primary model if no cheap profile is configured
adapter_no_overrides: This assignee's adapter does not expose editable issue overrides.
select_assignee_for_overrides: Select a compatible agent assignee to edit these overrides.
